operations.title: Monthly Reserve Rebalancing
operations.summary: Protocol-governed monthly rebalancing of reserve instruments to optimize liquidity while maintaining a minimum 180-day runway.

operations.title: Disbursement Automation Pipeline
operations.summary: Automated release of bounty and public-goods payments upon verified completion triggers. Reducing manual treasury overheadestimated 35%.

operations.title: Cross-Chain Reserve Bridge Audit
operations.summary: Independent review of reserve bridging mechanisms prior to extending digital asset support to additional settlement layers.

assets.title: Stable Liquidity Pool — $ETH / $USDC
assets.summary: Balanced liquidity pool providing settlement depth for the exchange module. Rules: immutable AMM parameters, transparent fee split.

assets.title: Contribution Certificate (NFT-based)
assets.summary: Verifiable credential minted upon completion of significant public-goods work. Non-transferable; builds sybil-resistant reputation.

assets.title: Participation Token — Quadratic Funding Rounds
assets.summary: Protocol-minted participation token issued per funding round. Encodes voter preference weight for match-rate calculation.

reserves.title: General Operating Reserve
reserves.summary: Primary operating reserve covering 180+ days of protocol-critical expenditures. Composition published monthly.

reserves.title: Emergent Opportunities Fund
reserves.summary: Civic Assembly-governed reserve for time-sensitive public-goods opportunities. Disbursement requires Assembly approval.

reserves.title: Stabilization Reserve
reserves.summary: Mechanism under review for dampening settlement-layer volatility. Design document open for public comment.
